Name: Pict Editor Timeline
Tagline: Pict visual timeline editor for building multi-beat video storyboards. Add, reorder, and configure cuts with text prompts, durations, and optional start/end frame image slots. Exports clean JSON consumable by any downstream video generation system.
Icon:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 96" width="96" height="96">
		<defs>
			<clipPath id="frame-pict-editor-timeline-filled-light">
				<path d="M 48.00 2.00 L 87.84 25.00 L 87.84 71.00 L 48.00 94.00 L 8.16 71.00 L 8.16 25.00 Z"/>
			</clipPath>
		</defs>
		<path d="M 48.00 2.00 L 87.84 25.00 L 87.84 71.00 L 48.00 94.00 L 8.16 71.00 L 8.16 25.00 Z" fill="#b9942f"/>
		<g clip-path="url(#frame-pict-editor-timeline-filled-light)"><path d="M 71.08 20.37 A 36 36 0 0 1 24.92 75.63 Z" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)" opacity="0.95"/>
					<path d="M 71.08 20.37 A 36 36 0 0 0 24.92 75.63 Z" fill="#68c1bc" opacity="0.95"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
			font-size="28" font-weight="600"
			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">PET</text>
	</svg>
